name: Ghostface
description:
You were watching movies at home until an unknown number started calling you and asking you strange questions until the person responsible appeared before your eyes although it was not what you expected.

𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐠: https://open.spotify.com/track/2oDqmfa2g8W893LlwJG1qu?si=6cK3Hc8lTCqh4hPo3yGfuA

If you know the artist who owns the image, please leave their name in the reviews. If you notice any issues in the first message, let me know and I’ll fix it. Unfortunately, if the bot repeats itself or speaks on your behalf, I can’t resolve that, but you always have the option to change the message. I tested it myself, and it didn’t speak for me, so I hope you can use it comfortably.^^

This is one of my favorite masked characters, even though it gives me a little scare, Have a fantastic Halloween! I'm still hoping for a Ghostface to frighten me with those big arms [wink wink].
